Applying to 00011010
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 0
Output
0 C 0n = NOT(1) = 0
1 I 0 = 0
2 I 1 = 0
3 I 2 = 0
4 I 3 = 1
5 I 4 = 1
6 I 5 = 0
7 I 6 = 1

\boxed{00001101}
